name: between-the-stars-chronicles
description: 群星之间 · 编年史 — 可视化虚拟历史查阅工具

scripts.dev: node src/validators/validate-data.js --validate-only && node convert-changelog.js && eleventy && node src/validators/validate-data.js && node build.js && eleventy --serve --port 9000
scripts.build: node src/validators/validate-data.js --validate-only && node convert-changelog.js && eleventy && node src/validators/validate-data.js && node build.js
